articles.title: Henry Zeffman: Keir Starmer fights back for now
articles.description: The prime minister told the Cabinet a leadership contest had not been triggered, and that he wouldn't be resigning.

articles.title: Jess Phillips's resignation letter in full
articles.description: The prominent Labour MP has resigned as safeguarding minister over Sir Keir Starmer's leadership.

articles.title: At a glance: Starmer grapples with leadership crisis
articles.description: The prime minister is fighting to stay on in No 10 as heavy election losses trigger a Labour revolt.

articles.title: Watch: Reporters shout questions at ministers leaving No 10
articles.description: Several ministers were met with a barrage of questions about the PM's future after leaving a cabinet meeting.
